checks.name: Backend auth base is configured
checks.detail: Using backend auth origin from mobile/server env.

checks.name: Mobile return URL is configured
checks.detail: Return URL is present without exposing credentials.

checks.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID is configured
checks.detail: Server-side Google client id is present.

checks.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET is configured
checks.detail: Server-side Google client secret is present.

checks.name: Mobile return URL uses an allowed app/dev scheme
checks.detail: Allowed schemes are holiwyn:, exp:, and exps:.

checks.name: NEXTAUTH_URL is reachable by a physical Android browser
checks.detail: Use HTTPS hosted auth or a LAN IP callback for S23 Expo/manual testing.

checks.name: Google start route returns a redirect
checks.detail: Expected a 3xx response from backend auth start.

checks.name: Google start redirect points at accounts.google.com
checks.detail: Redirect host is checked without printing query secrets.

checks.name: Google redirect_uri matches NEXTAUTH_URL callback
checks.detail: Google Cloud authorized redirect URI should match this callback exactly.
